channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Miley Cyrus Spotted Filming 'Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special' in Malibu
item.description: Miley Cyrus just turned Malibu into a full-blown "Hannah Montana" time capsule. The singer was photographed cruising along the Southern California coa...

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Reacts To Outpouring of Support After Eric Dane's Death
item.description: Rebecca Gayheart is acknowledging the overwhelming outpouring of love surrounding her family following Eric Dane's death. The actress shared an emotio...

item.title: Puerto Vallarta, Mexico Under Siege After Army Kills Major Cartel Leader

item.title: Guess Who This Movie Star-Turned-Talk Show Host Is!!!

item.title: Timothée Chalamet and Kylie Jenner Turn BAFTAs Into Romantic Date Night

item.title: Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
